post.description: Old tutorial expected to see 'Vertex AI in Firebase' heading before the May 2025 rename
Old tutorial showed import path as 'firebase/vertexai' and method 'getVertexAI()'

meta.rationale: Firebase renamed 'Vertex AI in Firebase' to 'Firebase AI Logic' in May 2025, and updated SDK imports from 'firebase/vertexai' to 'firebase/ai', methods from 'getVertexAI()' to 'getAI()', and errors from 'VertexAIError' to 'AIError'. The navigation to access AI features in Firebase Console remained identical (same sidebar menu, same clicks), but all page headings, documentation references, and SDK terminology changed. Old tutorials checking for 'Vertex AI in Firebase' headings or showing 'firebase/vertexai' import paths would fail verification even though the navigation path and underlying functionality remained the same.

postcondition_changes.navigation_unchanged: Same sidebar navigation path to AI features
postcondition_changes.note: Breaking change - old imports removed entirely in SDK v12.0.0 (July 2025)
